---
title: "Tutorials"
date: ""
listing:
  contents: 
    - posts
    - "!posts/presentation/demo"
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: list.html
---

#### Attributions {.appendix}

Artwork from ["Hello, Quarto"](https://mine.quarto.pub/hello-quarto/) keynote by [Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel](https://mine-cr.com/) and [Julia Stewart Lowndes](https://jules32.github.io/), presented at RStudio Conference 2022. Illustrated by [Allison Horst](https://allisonhorst.com).

[![A schematic representing the multi-language input (e.g. Python, R, Observable, Julia) and multi-format output (e.g. PDF, html, Word documents, and more) versatility of Quarto.](posts/manuscript/images/quar.png)](https://allisonhorst.com/cetinkaya-rundel-lowndes-quarto-keynote)

[![Two penguins in a room made of ice, looking out a window. One penguin is holding an icicle as a pointer, pointing at a Quarto logo "moon" in the sky, while the other penguin looks on.](posts/presentation/images/pres.png)](https://allisonhorst.com/cetinkaya-rundel-lowndes-quarto-keynote)

For more from Allison, see her [website](https://allisonhorst.com) and [GitHub](https://github.com/allisonhorst).
